subject: MRU-002

diagnostic_confirmation.conflict: Git object hashes are 40-character hexadecimal strings while ALMS SHA-256 expectations require 64-character hexadecimal strings.
diagnostic_confirmation.policy_result: No silent promotion preserved actual observed reality over expected state.
diagnostic_confirmation.security_posture: Mismatch retained as audit evidence rather than corrected in place.

next_valid_paths: MRU-002A recompute canonical SHA-256 over exact committed bytes
MRU-003 define identity namespace separation for git_sha1 vs content_sha256
GITFIX-001 add verifier rule rejecting sha256 labels shorter than 64 hex
